justification: Contract section 3.4 requires signed Exhibit B forms and a store execution report for demo billbacks; this claim has neither — only photos from 6 stores and a buyer email referencing an unspecified discussion. The claimed rate ($200/event) also conflicts with the $250/event authorized under PROMO-2026-Q1-010, and the claimed period extends beyond the promo window. Evidence is insufficient and internally inconsistent — escalate for buyer follow-up rather than deny outright, since some events may be documentable.
